content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s general iterative self-improvement pipeline for code to incorporate the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that surfaces hidden flaws an LLM would miss when working from a single initial output perspective. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data, while boosting refinement quality by leveraging perspective diversity.
